details: The agent executed appropriate commands and produced a complete, correct answer. It found 978 total results (a large number meeting the known facts requirement), correctly sorted by creation date descending to get the 5 most recent issues, and reported all three required fields (title, state, assignee) for each. The agent correctly identified that no assignee fields appeared in the results, concluding all 5 are unassigned. The trajectory shows proper command execution, error recovery (wrong --per-page flag corrected to --perPage), and accurate data extraction from the results.
